description: Read-first Amplitude Analytics API surface for exports, cohorts, events, users, and chart-style analytics queries.

novel_features.name: Agent command discovery
novel_features.description: Map a natural-language capability request to the exact generated CLI command before executing it.

novel_features.name: Structured agent context
novel_features.description: Emit machine-readable command, auth, and profile metadata so agents can plan calls without scraping help text.

novel_features.name: Local SQLite sync framework
novel_features.description: Sync selected API resources into a local SQLite store for repeatable offline inspection and analysis.

novel_features.name: SQL analytics on synced records
novel_features.description: Run read-only SQL against synced API records for compound questions the upstream API does not expose directly.
